# /grow — Wishlist
# Ideas for future auto-generated pages.
# Format: [tag] Title — short description
# Tags: game | tool | art | story
# ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

[story] The Coriolis Myth     — how Earth's rotation dictates weather, but not the flush of a toilet  ✅
[tool]  Laplace Transform     — convert a time-domain wave into its s-domain frequency peaks  ✅
